lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee kee vaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Vaar Of Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੁਣੀਦਾ ਤੈਸੋ ਹੀ ਮੈ ਡੀਠੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa satigur suneedaa taiso hee mai ddeetth |
lines.english: As I have heard of the True Guru, so I have seen Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਮੇਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਕਾ ਬਸੀਠੁ ॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa mele prabhoo har daragah kaa baseetth |
lines.english: He re-unites the separated ones with God; He is the Mediator at the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਦਾ ਕਟੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har naamo mantru drirraaeidaa katte haumai rog |
lines.english: He implants the Mantra of the Lord's Name, and eradicates the illness of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਧੁਰੇ ਪਇਆ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur tinaa milaaeaa jinaa dhure peaa sanjog |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone meets the True Guru, who has such union pre-ordained. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੇਖਾਲਿਆ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai dekhaaliaa vin naavai sabh baad |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has shown me that, without the Name, everything is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਸਜਣੁ ਸਭਿ ਸਜਣਾ ਇਕੁ ਵੈਰੀ ਸਭਿ ਵਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik sajan sabh sajanaa ik vairee sabh vaad |
lines.english: If the One Lord is my Friend, then all are my friends. If the One Lord is my enemy, then all fight with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਦੁਰਜਨ ਭਰਮਿਆ ਜੋ ਲਗੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: saakat durajan bharamiaa jo lage doojai saad |
lines.english: The faithless cynics and the evil people wander in reincarnation; they are attached to other tastes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har prabh bujhiaa gur satigur kai parasaad |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has realized the Lord God, by the Grace of the Guru, the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਸਾਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗ ਰਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape kar paasaar aape rang rattiaa |
lines.english: He Himself made the expansive Universe; He Himself is imbued with joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਟਣਹਾਰੈ ਥਾਟੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਥਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: thattanahaarai thaatt aape hee thattiaa |
lines.english: The Creator Lord created the Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਖਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape pooraa saahu aape hee khattiaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the perfect Banker; He Himself earns His profit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਇ ਅਲਖ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kudarat keem na paae alakh brahamattiaa |
lines.english: The value of God's almighty creative power cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਥਾਹ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਪਰੈ ਪਰਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: agam athaah beant parai parattiaa |
lines.english: He is inaccessible, unfathomable, endless, the farthest of the far.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੀਮ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਮਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: koe na jaanai keem kevadd mattiaa |
lines.english: No one knows His worth, or the greatness of His resting place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵਡ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਵਜੀਰਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape vadd paatisaahu aap vajeerattiaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the greatest Emperor; He Himself is His own Prime Minister.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib aap guramukh paragattiaa |1|
lines.english: He Himself is our True Lord and Master. He reveals Himself to the Gurmukh. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਵਾ ਮਨੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਿਤ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਾ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau tis devaa man aapanaa nit hiradai rakhaa samaal |
lines.english: I dedicate my mind to Him; I keep Him continually enshrined within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸਜਣ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਮੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਿਖਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sun sajan preetam meriaa mai satigur dehu dikhaal |
lines.english: Listen, O my beloved friend: please show me the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikas satigur baaharaa dhrig jeevan sansaar |
lines.english: Without the One and Only True Guru, life in this world is cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਿਲਾਇਓਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਵਰਤੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak satigur tinaa milaaeon jin sad hee varatai naal |1|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, they alone meet the True Guru, with whom He constantly abides. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਚਾ ਮਿਲਣ ਕੀ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: merai antar lochaa milan kee kiau paavaa prabh tohi |
lines.english: Deep within me is the longing to meet You; how can I find You, God?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਐਸਾ ਸਜਣੁ ਲੋੜਿ ਲਹੁ ਜੋ ਮੇਲੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: koee aisaa sajan lorr lahu jo mele preetam mohi |
lines.english: I will search for someone, some friend, who will unite me with my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ਜਤ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਤ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai melaaeaa jat dekhaa tat soe |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has united me with Him; wherever I look, there He is.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak so prabh seviaa tis jevadd avar na koe |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak serves that God; there is no other as great as He is. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: devanahaar daataar kit mukh saalaaheeai |
lines.english: He is the Great Giver, the Generous Lord; with what mouth can I praise Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਵਸਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਇਕ ਧਰ ॥
lines.translit: koe na kis hee vas sabhanaa ik dhar |
lines.english: No one is under anyone else's control; He is the One Support of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਰਖੈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis rakhai kirapaa dhaar rijak samaaheeai |
lines.english: In His Mercy, He protects, preserves and sustains us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਧਾਰ ਸਮਰਥ ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sarab dhaar samarath hau tis kurabaaneeai |
lines.english: The all-powerful Lord gives His Support to all; I am a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਦਾ ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: karadaa anad binod kichhoo na jaaneeai |
lines.english: He stages His joyous plays, which no one understands at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਲੇ ਬਾਲਕ ਵਾਗਿ ਦੇ ਕੈ ਆਪਿ ਕਰ ॥
lines.translit: paale baalak vaag de kai aap kar |
lines.english: He cherishes all as His children, and reaches out with His hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਈਐ ਰਾਤਿ ਦਿਨੰਤੁ ਗਾਵਣ ਜੋਗਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gaaeeai raat dinant gaavan jogiaa |
lines.english: Night and day, sing the Praises of the One who is worthy of being praised.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪੈਰੀ ਪਾਹਿ ਤਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਭੋਗਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo gur kee pairee paeh tinee har ras bhogiaa |2|
lines.english: Those who fall at the Guru's Feet, enjoy the sublime essence of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਜ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਦਾ ਸਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaaraj aap savaarian so prabh sadaa sabhaal |
lines.english: He Himself has arranged and resolved my affairs. I dwell upon that God forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀੜਹੁ ਮੋਕਲਾਈ ਕੀਤੀਅਨੁ ਸਭ ਰਖੇ ਕੁਟੰਬੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bheerrahu mokalaaee keeteean sabh rakhe kuttanbai naal |
lines.english: He has widened the narrow path for me, and preserved my integrity, along with that of my family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਹੋਏ ਸਭ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ੍ਰ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deaal hoe sabh jeea jantr har naanak nadar nihaal |1|
lines.english: All beings and creatures have become kind and compassionate to me. O Nanak, the Lord has blessed me with His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇਦਾ ਲਹੁੜੇ ਬਾਲਕ ਪਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh maat pitaa kantth laaeidaa lahurre baalak paal |
lines.english: God is my mother and father; He hugs me close in His embrace, and cherishes me, like His tiny baby.
